prompt:
A screenshot-style image of the dating app "Tinder" (9:16 aspect ratio).

Completely recreate the Tinder UI:
- "Tinder" logo at the top
- Swipe card in the center: A photo of Mona (banana on head, yellow blouse, white skirt). Smiling and facing forward.

Information at the bottom of the card (Tinder-specific design):
Profile name: "Mona Banana 🍌"
Age: "18"
Distance: "0km away · Suita City"

Bio (body) text:
"Don't mind the banana on my head. It just won't come off 🍌
Likes: Bananas, magical girls, bananas, rice, bananas
Dream: To save the world with banana power
Type: People who don't ask 'Why is there a banana on your head?' 🙅"

Interests badges: "Cooking 🍳", "Music 🎵", "Magic ✨", "Banana Studies 🍌"

Button UI at the bottom for "Like / Super Like / Skip"

A screenshot that looks exactly like the real Tinder app.
